name: Auto Update Versioning
# for apk/manifest
on:
  schedule:
    # Runs at 00:00 on the 1st and 15th of every month
    - cron: '0 0 1,15 * *'
  workflow_dispatch:
  # push:
  #   branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  update-version:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write

    steps:
      - name: Checkout Repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Generate YY.MM.DD Version
        id: vars
        run: echo "DATE_VERSION=$(date +'%y.%m.%d')" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Sync Version in Manifest and Service Worker
        run: |
          VERSION="${{ steps.vars.outputs.DATE_VERSION }}"
          
          # Update version and version_name in manifest.json
          # Handles both "version": "..." and "version_name": "..."
          sed -i "s/\"version\": \".*\"/\"version\": \"$VERSION\"/" manifest.json
          sed -i "s/\"version_name\": \".*\"/\"version_name\": \"$VERSION\"/" manifest.json
          
          # Update the VERSION constant in sw.js to ensure immediate cache-busting
          # This replaces the JS logic with the static string generated by the runner
          sed -i "s/const VERSION = .*;/const VERSION = '$VERSION';/" sw.js

      - name: Commit and Push Changes
        run: |
          git config --global user.name "hassanbiswas"
          git config --global user.email "hassanbiswas.github.io@gmail.com"
          git add manifest.json sw.js
          
          # Only commit if there are changes to avoid workflow errors
          if git diff --staged --quiet; then
            echo "No version changes to commit."
          else
            git commit -m "chore: automated version bump to ${{ steps.vars.outputs.DATE_VERSION }} [skip ci]"
            git push
          fi
